title: Tunisian Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful North African stew made with chicken, vegetables, and aromatic spices. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat the oil in the tagine over medium heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through, about 8-10 minutes.
Add the onions, garlic, and ginger; cook until the onions are translucent.
Add the zucchini, olives, and curry paste; cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the chicken broth, tunisian spice blend, and honey; bring to a boil.
Cover the tagine and transfer to the oven; cook for 20-25 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
